articles.author: Teo Armus
articles.title: What Tuesday’s big midterm contests will reveal about Trump and Democrats - The Washington Post
articles.description: New congressional maps will debut in Texas and North Carolina as Republicans try to defend their majorities and Democrats hope they can flip both chambers.
articles.content: The 2026 midterm election season kicks off Tuesday with primaries in Arkansas, North Carolina and Texas, including several high-profile contests that will set the tone for November as voters weigh in… [+93 chars]

articles.author: Steve Hendrix, Heidi Levine
articles.title: Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours - The Washington Post
articles.description: In less than three days, the conflict ricocheted beyond the original targets in Iran, Israel and Iraq to threaten some 300 million civilians across more than a dozen nations.
articles.content: BEIT SHEMESH, Israel Even before U.S. and Israeli warplanes struck Iranian targets, officials in Washington and Jerusalem were bracing for retaliation. They had gamed out missile salvos, cyberattacks… [+246 chars]
